title: Morphology-Matched Forward Readout Gates for Tau Core Gravity
description: Reproducibility package for the Paper 8 internal-preflight morphology-matched forward-readout protocol. The package contains claim-bounded scripts, derived artifacts, manuscript source, rendered PDF, arXiv source package, and source-native robustness diagnostics. It should be read as a reproducible protocol and internal-preflight signal, not as empirical evidence for a new gravitational law.
notes: The endpoint statistics do not depend on accepting the Tau Core theory-motivation appendix. Online acquisition paths and cache fallbacks are documented in README.md.
